# Stop Biting
> An app that uses on-device AI to detect nail biting (onychophagia) in real-time via webcam, then sounds an alarm. 100% private — no camera data leaves your device. Available as a native desktop app for Mac and Windows, and as a web app.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://stopbiting.today/): Landing page — download, features, privacy commitment
- [Blog](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog): Science-backed articles on nail biting, habit reversal, and onychophagia

## Blog articles

- [Why Do People Bite Their Nails?](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/why-do-people-bite-their-nails): Causes, triggers, and the psychology behind onychophagia
- [Habit Reversal Training: The Complete Guide](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/habit-reversal-training-guide): Evidence-based HRT technique for stopping nail biting
- [The Real Health Risks of Nail Biting](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/nail-biting-health-risks): Dental damage, infections, and long-term consequences
- [Nail Biting in Children: What Parents Should Know](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/nail-biting-in-children): Age-appropriate strategies and when to seek help
- [Best Remedies to Stop Nail Biting](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/best-nail-biting-remedies): Ranking every method from bitter polish to AI detection
- [The Stress–Nail Biting Connection](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/stress-and-nail-biting): Why anxiety drives the habit and how to break the loop
- [Onychophagia and OCD: Understanding the Link](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/onychophagia-ocd-connection): BFRB classification, OCD-spectrum overlap, treatment implications
- [How AI Can Help You Stop Biting Your Nails](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/how-ai-can-help-stop-nail-biting): Real-time webcam detection and the awareness mechanism
- [Nail Biting at Work: The Focus–Habit Loop](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/nail-biting-during-focus-and-work): Why deep concentration triggers biting and how to interrupt it
- [The Science of Breaking Any Habit](https://stopbiting.today/#/blog/breaking-any-habit-science): Neuroscience of habit loops applied to nail biting

## Key facts

- Nail biting (onychophagia) affects 20–30% of adults
- Habit Reversal Training (HRT) reduces biting frequency by 70–90% in consistent practitioners
- The app uses MediaPipe running in WebAssembly — zero network requests during detection
- Detection works fully offline after initial setup
- Free to start — available for macOS 12+, Windows, and in the browser
